purpose: Phase-2 contract for native pathname DSO loader beyond self-contained shared objects

constructors_destructors.init_array: Call DT_INIT_ARRAY entries in order on load
constructors_destructors.fini_array: Call DT_FINI_ARRAY entries in reverse order on unload

tls_handling.static_tls: Allocate from TLS template on load

relro.gnu_relro: Make PT_GNU_RELRO segment read-only after relocation
relro.bind_now: Process all relocations at load time with DF_BIND_NOW

ifunc.reason: IFUNC resolvers require runtime dispatch; use direct symbols
ifunc.fail_mode: Return ENOSYS from dlopen for DSOs containing STT_GNU_IFUNC

namespace.reason: dlmopen and link namespaces not implemented

lazy_binding.reason: All bindings are immediate in standalone mode

delegation_policy.when_standalone: Use native owned loader for all dlopen/dlsym/dlclose
delegation_policy.when_interpose: Delegate to host glibc ld.so via WrapsHostLibc
delegation_policy.fallback: If native loader fails, do NOT fall back to host

support_matrix_update.dlopen: WrapsHostLibc (phase-1 native local/pathname handles plus host-backed interpose delegation; native-only standalone loader remains phase-2 scope)
support_matrix_update.dlsym: WrapsHostLibc (phase-1 native local/pathname handles plus host-backed interpose delegation; native-only standalone loader remains phase-2 scope)
support_matrix_update.dlclose: WrapsHostLibc (phase-1 native local/pathname handles plus host-backed interpose delegation; native-only standalone loader remains phase-2 scope)
